problem.title: Bucket Sort
problem.description: Implement bucket sort algorithm for sorting floating point numbers.
assumptions: Input values are uniformly distributed over [0, 1).

example.explanation: Distribute elements into buckets, sort each bucket, then concatenate.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Bucket Sort Implementation [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: Distribute elements into n equally-spaced buckets based on their value, sort each bucket individually, then concatenate them. The algorithm achieves near-linear average time when input is uniformly distributed, because each bucket contains only a constant number of elements on average.
